features: EASY & DAMAGE-FREE STYLING – Skip hot tools and achieve beautiful heatless curls overnight with the Kitsch satin heatless curling set. Designed for all hair types, this heatless hair curler helps you get salon-worthy results without frizz, breakage, or heat damage.

COMFORTABLE TO WEAR DAY OR NIGHT – Our 34" heatless curling rod is made of 100% satin and designed as hair curlers to sleep in, so you can enjoy effortless overnight curls or wear them while getting ready. Wake up with gorgeous no heat curls overnight that last all day.

COMPLETE SET OF HAIR ACCESSORIES – Includes 1 satin heatless curling rod and 2 matching satin scrunchies that gently secure your strands. A must-have in your collection of hair accessories and versatile hair accessories for women who love easy, damage-free styling.

TIME-SAVING HAIR STYLING TOOLS – Just spend 5 minutes wrapping your hair around the satin curling rod, secure with satin scrunchies, and let them work while you sleep. This overnight blowout rod makes it simple to get the look of a polished overnight blowout with minimal effort.

ORIGINAL KITSCH DESIGN – Trusted for quality hair styling tools, Kitsch delivers the best in heatless curlers and overnight hair curlers. Whether for travel, home use, or holiday gifting, these overnight curlers make a thoughtful gift for women and are the perfect stocking stuffers for beauty lovers.
